description.from: Deals ??? M.DMG to enemies in range, stunning them for 5 sec.
description.to: Deals 361*(1+0.3Skill Level)+277.6% of Attack Power damage to enemies within range and stuns them for 3 sec.

description.from: Engraves a Mark on all enemies for 30 sec and deals ??? M.DMG over time. Enemies engraved with Mark takes 25% more M.DMG. This effect increases by 20% upon every use. This effect can be stacked up to max 5 times and is irremovable.
description.to: Engraves [Mark of Death] on all enemies for 15 sec, dealing 9(1+0.3Skill Level)+6.9% of Attack Power continuous Magic Damage. Enemies with [Mark of Death] take 25% increased Magic Damage, and if recast within 15 sec, the effect is increased by 20%. This effect stacks up to 5 times and cannot be dispelled.

description.from: Deals M.DMG to all enemies every sec for 15 sec, heals own HP equal to 100% of DMG dealt, and inflicts Stun on the hit target for 1 sec with a 10% chance. For the duration of Skill, gains immunity to CC. Against Marked targets, deals increased ??? M.DMG.
description.to:
Deals 127(1+0.3Skill Level)+97.6% of Attack Power Magic Damage per second to all enemies for 12 sec, recovers HP equal to 130% of damage dealt, and has a 10% chance to stun them for 0.6 sec.
During the duration, all allies take 20% reduced Physical Damage, and enemies with [Mark of Death] take additional Magic Damage equal to 97.6% of Attack Power.

description.from: Increases M.DEF of all allies. Upon taking fatal DMG, enters a coffin for 5 sec and heals HP equal to proportional to ATK + 6% of Max HP. While inside the coffin, Jane is not affected by ATK Spd effects, ignores All DMG, and deals M.DMG equal to 5% of Max HP to nearby enemies every sec.
description.to:
Increases all allies’ Physical Defense by 45(1+0.3Skill Level).
When taking damage that would be fatal, enters [Coffin] state for 5 sec, restoring 197(1+0.3Skill Level)+153.7% of Attack Power + 6% of Max HP.
While in [Coffin] state, Attack Speed changes do not affect you, you are immune to all damage, and deal Magic Damage equal to 5% of Max HP per second to nearby enemies.

light.from: Target takes 25% increased M.DMG for 10 sec.
light.to: Recovers HP equal to 50% of damage dealt.

dark.from: In exchange for 1 additional Mana Cost, the skill has a 100% chance to draw the target in.
dark.to: Mana cost is increased by 1000, but pulls the target to your vicinity with a 100% success rate.

light.from: Duration is reduced to 10 sec and DMG is boosted by 250%.
light.to: Debuff duration is reduced to 10 sec, but damage is increased by 500%.

dark.from: Upon use, dispels negative effects of all allies.
dark.to: Mana cost is increased by 1000, but cooldown is reduced by 7 sec.

dark.from: Upon activation, stun all enemies for 2 sec.
dark.to: When the effect triggers, stuns all enemies for 1.2 sec.

description.from: [Funeral Rites] For 10 sec, reduces the target's CC Resist by 250 and M.Block by {0}.
description.to: [Funeral Rites] reduces the target’s CC Resist by 400 and Magic Block chance by {0} for 4 sec.

description.from: [Mark of Death] Increases ATK by 5% and Crit DMG by {0}% for 20 sec when the marked enemy dies. This effect stacks up to 8 times.
description.to: [Mark of Death] When a marked enemy dies, increases own ATK by 5% and Crit DMG by {0}% for 20 sec. Stacks up to 16 times.

description.from: [Day of Ruin] DMG is increased by {0}% and with every DMG dealt, target's M.DEF is reduced by 5% for 5 sec. This effect can stack a max 10 times.
description.to: [Day of Ruin] increases DMG by {0}% and reduces the target’s M.DEF by 3% for 5 sec each time damage is dealt. This effect can stack up to 10 times.

description.from: [Rest in Peace] Upon activation, dispels all negative effects from all allies and reduces All DMG dealt on self by {0}% for 10 sec.
description.to: [Rest in Peace] reduces all DMG taken by {0}% for 10 sec after use. Cooldown set to 40 sec.

description.from: Deals M.DMG equal to {0}% of ATK to nearby enemies and reduces their ATK by {1}% every sec. Additionally, increases DMG dealt against Non-Hero enemies of the ally with the highest ATK excluding self by {2}%. The DMG Boost effect is irremovable. When the Passive Skill is activated, recovers 30% of Mana.
description.to:
Deals Magic Damage equal to {0}% of Attack Power per second to nearby enemies, reduces their Attack by {1}%, and recovers HP equal to 75% of damage dealt.
The 4 allies with the highest Attack (excluding yourself) deal {2}% increased damage to non-hero enemies. This effect cannot be dispelled.
